original_image_tags: A hand-drawn diagram on a dark background showing two perspectives of a flight path.

elements.description: Hand-drawn diagram labeled 'Side View' showing a perspective view with labels including '40 degrees', '5 miles', 'My Position', 'Mt Charleston', and an 'X' mark. The sketch depicts an angle or trajectory.
Hand-drawn diagram labeled 'View from Above' showing a top-down path with arrows, labeled 'X Mt Charleston' and 'First Sighted'. A compass rose is visible in the bottom left indicating N, S, E, W.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there is a hand-drawn diagram with two perspectives, but B adds many specific labels ('Side View', 'View from Above', 'Mt Charleston', 'My Position', etc.) that A does not mention, without contradiction.
